mapper.select: SELECT * FROM erp_tax_invoices ORDER BY write_date DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM erp_tax_invoice_items WHERE tax_invoice_id = #{taxInvoiceId}::uuid ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_tax_invoices ( id, issue_id, write_date, supplier_reg_no, supplier_sub_no, supplier_name, supplier_ceo, supplier_address, supplier_biz_type, supplier_biz_item, supplier_email, customer_reg_no, customer_sub_no, customer_name, customer_ceo, customer_address, customer_biz_type, customer_biz_item, customer_email1, total_supply_value, total_tax_value, total_amount, purpose, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{issueId}, #{writeDate}::date, #{supplierRegNo}, #{supplierSubNo}, #{supplierName}, #{supplierCeo}, #{supplierAddress}, #{supplierBizType}, #{supplierBizItem}, #{supplierEmail}, #{customerRegNo}, #{customerSubNo}, #{customerName}, #{customerCeo}, #{customerAddress}, #{customerBizType}, #{customerBizItem}, #{customerEmail1}, #{totalSupplyValue}, #{totalTaxValue}, #{totalAmount}, #{purpose}, #{status}, #{createdBy}::uuid, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_tax_invoices SET write_date = #{writeDate}::date, supplier_reg_no = #{supplierRegNo}, supplier_sub_no = #{supplierSubNo}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, supplier_ceo = #{supplierCeo}, supplier_address = #{supplierAddress}, supplier_biz_type = #{supplierBizType}, supplier_biz_item = #{supplierBizItem}, supplier_email = #{supplierEmail}, customer_reg_no = #{customerRegNo}, customer_sub_no = #{customerSubNo}, customer_name = #{customerName}, customer_ceo = #{customerCeo}, customer_address = #{customerAddress}, customer_biz_type = #{customerBizType}, customer_biz_item = #{customerBizItem}, customer_email1 = #{customerEmail1}, total_supply_value = #{totalSupplyValue}, total_tax_value = #{totalTaxValue}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, purpose = #{purpose}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM erp_tax_invoices WHERE write_date = #{writeDate}::date
